calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Feb-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Bo Zeng, Esq., and Ali Ari Aalaei, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Bia2, LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Reza Alvand, dba Pyramid Entertainment.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 20 dismissed without prejudice.
Witness: Amir Pakzadian sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $40,020.09
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,859.47
Costs: $747.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $44,627.06
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Continued To Jan-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Request For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Bo Zeng, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BIA2 LLC, a Limited Liability Company.

Court ordered Default Prove-up re-set to 2/21/2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514. Counsel to re-notice Hearing by filing documentation at the clerk's office and provide Department 514 with filed endorsed copies of document in compliance with the local rules.

Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
